ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: Language specific cardinal to ordinal number conversion.
Language specific cardinal to ordinal number conversion.

name: r-toordinal
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = '1.4-0.0' %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-toordinal
  version: "{{ version|replace('-', '_') }}"

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/toOrdinal_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/toOrdinal/toOrdinal_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 6510b052491739c726bcd027f92ec98dd0d0d257a4a8b857200de6138673dfbb

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-crayon
    - r-pkgsearch
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-crayon
    - r-pkgsearch

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('toOrdinal')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('toOrdinal')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://centerforassessment.github.io/toOrdinal/
  dev_url: https://github.com/centerforassessment/toOrdinal
  license: GPL-3.0-only
  summary: Language specific cardinal to ordinal number conversion.
  license_family: GPL3
  license_file:
    - '{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/GPL-3'

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r

# Package: toOrdinal
# Version: 1.4-0.0
# Date: 2026-2-5
# Title: Cardinal to Ordinal Number & Date Conversion
# Description: Language specific cardinal to ordinal number conversion.
# Authors@R: c(person(given=c("Damian", "W."), family="Betebenner", email="dbetebenner@nciea.org", role=c("aut", "cre")), person(given="Andrew", family="Martin", role="ctb"), person(given="Jeff", family="Erickson", role="ctb"))
# Maintainer: Damian W. Betebenner <dbetebenner@nciea.org>
# Depends: R (>= 3.3)
# Suggests: knitr, rmarkdown, testthat
# Imports: crayon, pkgsearch
# URL: https://centerforassessment.github.io/toOrdinal/, https://github.com/centerforassessment/toOrdinal/, https://cran.r-project.org/package=toOrdinal
# BugReports: https://github.com/centerforassessment/toOrdinal/issues/
# VignetteBuilder: knitr
# LazyLoad: Yes
# ByteCompile: TRUE
# License: GPL-3
# NeedsCompilation: no
# Packaged: 2026-02-05 19:49:29 UTC; conet
# Author: Damian W. Betebenner [aut, cre], Andrew Martin [ctb], Jeff Erickson [ctb]
# Repository: CRAN
# Date/Publication: 2026-02-06 06:40:02 UTC
